2606.19387.title: Interpretable and Verifiable Hardware Generation with LLM-Driven Stepwise Refinement
2606.19387.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in software development. However, they are susceptible to hallucinations, meaning that they can introduce subtle semantic and logical errors. Due to the high stakes in chip design and manufacturing, hardware engineers are still reluctant to rely on LLMs for register-transfer level (RTL) generation. In this paper, we propose a hardware generation framework that combines the creativity and broad knowledge of LLMs with the explainability and mathematical rigor of formal methods. Specifically, we devise a set of transformation rules that cover various design decisions and hardware features. By iteratively applying these rules, an LLM agent can convert a design specification into an RTL program with guaranteed correctness. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the framework.
2606.19387.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 在軟體開發中取得了顯著的成功。<lb/>然而，它們容易出現幻覺，這意味著它們可能會引入微妙的語義和邏輯錯誤。<lb/>由於晶片設計和製造的高風險，硬體工程師仍然不願意依賴 LLMs 進行寄存器傳輸級 (RTL) 的生成。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一個硬體生成框架，將 LLMs 的創造力和廣泛知識與形式方法的可解釋性和數學嚴謹性相結合。<lb/>具體而言，我們設計了一組涵蓋各種設計決策和硬體特徵的轉換規則。<lb/>通過迭代應用這些規則，LLM 代理可以將設計規範轉換為具有保證正確性的 RTL 程式。<lb/>實驗結果證明了該框架的有效性和效率。
2606.19387.author: You Li et.al.
2606.19387.authors: You Li, Samuel Mandell, David Z. Pan
